channel.title: Azure News Feed
channel.description: Aggregated daily news from Azure blogs

item.title: Windows 11 Pro on my XPS is great
item.description: Windows 11 runs smoothly and performs much better than Windows 10. The new taskbar and icons look great and sharp on my 4K XPS display and I can receive regular Windows updates now
item.dc:creator: EmmettBrooks

item.title: Windows 10 Network Options Missing
item.description: Network settings and display disappeared after network reset, but internet still works. Need help to fix this.
item.dc:creator: AnselRhodes

item.title: Windows 10 Windows.old Size Shows Differently Across Tools
item.description: WinDirStat shows Windows.old as 200+GB, Disk Cleanup as 700+GB, and File Explorer as 1.0GB. Why the huge discrepancy?
item.dc:creator: GageWilder

item.title: Windows 10 Never Seen This Screen During Update
item.description: I encountered an unknown screen while updating Windows 10 and have never seen it before. Does anyone know what this is?
item.dc:creator: AnselRhodes

item.title: CI/CD as a Platform: Shipping Microservices and AI Agents with Reusable GitHub Actions Workflows
item.description: The First Shift — Treating CI/CD as a Platform The first insight is straightforward but underused: Your CI/CD logic is infrastructure. It deserves the same design discipline as your application code. That means centralizing it. Versioning it. Exposing it as reusable, callable workflows — not...
item.dc:creator: nasreensarah

item.title: Best fancy font generator for social media usernames and posts?
item.description: Trying to find a good fancy font generator for creating stylish text for social media (Instagram, TikTok, etc.). The default fonts are too plain, and most online tools either look outdated or generate weird symbols that don’t display properly on all devices. Using a Windows 11 laptop and mainly...
item.dc:creator: Asaoniu

item.title: The best way to repair a corrupted mp4 video file?
item.description: I recently used a data recovery tool to get back a few MP4 videos after an accidental drive format. While the file sizes look correct and the recovery software flagged them as "healthy," none of my media players can open them. Most players just show a black screen or throw an error saying the file...
item.dc:creator: Zaachary

item.title: How do I fix disk boot failure from my windows 10 pc?
item.description: Hi everyone,Made a bootable USB drive and tried to boot from it. However, this error message shows up on the screen:Disk Boot Failure, Insert System Disk and Press EnterNot sure what caused this issue. The PC was working fine before, and no major changes were made recently. I’m worried it might be...
item.dc:creator: Samuelyur

item.title: Conditional Access Policies are the Best Way to Block Weekend Access to Microsoft 365
item.description: Conditional access policies are very powerful. A beta feature appears to support time-limited blocks, but maybe the new feature is not needed because the same effect can be accomplished today through a mixture of conditional access policies, dynamic groups, and Azure Automation runbooks (or...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: From Toil to Trust: How Azure SRE Agent Is Redefining Cloud Operations
item.description: As Azure environments scale, infrastructure teams face a familiar challenge: operating reliably at scale.Outages are no longer caused by a single VM or misconfigured service—they emerge from complex dependencies across compute, networking, storage, and platform services. Azure SRE Agent is designed...
item.dc:creator: siddhigupta

item.title: Building Your First Local RAG Application with Foundry Local
item.description: A developer's guide to building an offline, mobile-responsive AI support agent using Retrieval-Augmented Generation, the Foundry Local SDK, and JavaScript. Imagine you are a gas field engineer standing beside a pipeline in a remote location. There is no Wi-Fi, no mobile signal, and you need a...
item.dc:creator: Lee_Stott

item.title: Gain Visibility into Cloud Browser Usage with Browser Activity Logs in Playwright Workspaces
item.description: Today, we're announcing a new feature to view the usage metrics for a browser session using the Browser Activity Logs in Playwright Workspaces. Modern test automation and browser-based workflows increasingly rely on cloud-hosted browsers. As teams scale their usage across test runs, automation...
item.dc:creator: AbhinavPremsekhar

item.title: Synchronizing Azure Storage Across Isolated Private Endpoint Networks
item.description: Introduction In Azure repatriation programs, enterprises often need to migrate large volumes of blob data from a source Azure environment to a target Azure environment under strict security and network isolation constraints. A typical repatriation setup includes fully isolated source and target...
item.dc:creator: deepakkumarv

item.title: System Windows Ram Problem Fix
item.description: You’ve probably seen this happen — you leave your desktop or laptop running, and after a while the system starts eating a huge chunk of your RAM, even on modern hardware.Today I’m bringing a fix that removes this issue permanently and gives Windows back the speed, stability, and clean behavior it...
item.dc:creator: kikero_exe

item.title: RAM stability after 21 hours uptime – optimization results
item.description: After my RAM optimization, the system remains fully stable even after 21 hours of continuous uptime. ✔️ RAM no longer fills up with nonsenseMemory usage stays within normal limits and Windows finally handles the standby cache the way it should. ✔️ High standby cache (18+ GB)This means faster app...
item.dc:creator: kikero_exe

item.title: Microsoft Entra innovations announced at RSAC 2026
item.description: Agentic AI is reshaping how organizations work, and it is fundamentally changing how we must think about protecting identity and access. As AI accelerates innovation, the number of users, devices, apps, and agents is exploding, creating an unprecedented number of digital identities across disparate...
item.dc:creator: Irina_Nechaeva

item.title: Autonomous Self-Healing for Azure VMware Solution Private Clouds
item.description: Overview Azure VMware Solution operates a global fleet of production private clouds, each running a full VMware NSX and vCenter Server control plane. As an example, when a VMware NSX Manager cluster loses quorum, NSX can surface multiple related alarms, but the documented impact is more specific...
item.dc:creator: RohanB

item.title: From Impersonation Calls to Transparent Reporting: Defending the New Front Door of Attacks
item.description: Email is still a major entry point—but it’s no longer the only one that matters. Today’s attackers are increasingly shifting to collaboration channels like Microsoft Teams, where trust is implicit and interaction is real time. Decisions happen fast, and that changes the economics of attacks....
item.dc:creator: JeffreyPinkston

item.title: How Microsoft Defender protects high-value assets in real-world attack scenarios
item.description: High-value assets including domain controllers, web servers, and identity infrastructure are frequent targets in sophisticated attacks. Microsoft Defender applies asset-aware protection using Microsoft Security Exposure Management to detect and block threats against these critical systems. This...
item.dc:creator: Microsoft Defender Security Research Team

item.title: What AI Agents for Modernization Look Like in Practice
item.description: We’ve all been put onto an initiative to “modernize” our company’s applications. But talk about a haphazard and confusing project to be put on. Apps are older than anyone first thought, there are dependencies nobody can explain, and business critical services blocked behind another team's roadmap....
item.dc:creator: PabloLopes

item.title: Building the agentic future together at JDConf 2026
item.description: JDConf 2026 is just weeks away, and I’m excited to welcome Java developers, architects, and engineering leaders from around the world for two days of learning and connection. Now in its sixth year, JDConf has become a place where the Java community compares notes on their real-world production...
item.dc:creator: Mayunk_Jain

item.title: The Retirement of SharePoint Alerts is a Pain in the Rear
item.description: I’ve used a SharePoint alert to create an emailed daily digest of changes made to files in a document library for seven years. Microsoft plans to retire SharePoint Alerts in July 2026, and the race is on to find a replacement. Regretfully, neither Power Automate nor SharePoint Rules seem capable of...
item.dc:creator: TonyRedmond

item.title: Unit Testing Helm Charts with Terratest: A Pattern Guide for Type-Safe Validation
item.description: Helm charts are the de facto standard for packaging Kubernetes applications. But here's a question worth asking: how do you know your chart actually produces the manifests you expect, across every environment, before it reaches a cluster? If you're like most teams, the answer is some combination of...
item.dc:creator: pratikpanda

item.title: Windows 10 Picture Password Not Working After Update
item.description: My picture password stopped working after a Windows 10 update, locking me out of the desktop. Any solutions?
item.dc:creator: KairosRivers

item.title: Windows 11 January Update KB5074109 Fails with Error 0x80073712
item.description: he 2026-01 security update (KB5074109) keeps failing with error code 0x80073712, showing "some update files are missing or have issues." Need a fix.
item.dc:creator: GageWilder

item.title: Building an Offline AI Interview Coach with Foundry Local, RAG, and SQLite
item.description: How to build a 100% offline, AI-powered interview preparation tool using Microsoft Foundry Local, Retrieval-Augmented Generation, and nothing but JavaScript. Foundry Local 100% Offline RAG + TF-IDF JavaScript / Node.js Contents Introduction What is RAG and Why Offline? Architecture Overview Setting...
item.dc:creator: Lee_Stott

item.title: Windows 11 Windows Security Center Not Opening
item.description: Clicking Windows Security Center does nothing; I can't open it to disable settings. Need a fix.
item.dc:creator: EmmettBrooks

item.title: How to 100% wipe a pc before selling for windows 10 and windows 11
item.description: Got dozens of old office PCs (mostly Windows 10 and Windows 11) that are going to be sold soon. These machines were used daily, so they likely contain sensitive data, including documents, login info, and cached files. A simple reset doesn’t feel safe enough, especially when data recovery tools are...
item.dc:creator: Ashleyye

item.title: Have OneDrive or SharePoint files/folders on home screen of iPad without internet connection?
item.description: This. I'm on a big iOS project. We have several users who need files on an ipad when traveling, and be able to open them when there is no internet connectivity. These files aren't intended to be edited, just 'read only.' These files do not contain any sensitive corporate data. The content lives in...
item.dc:creator: net1994

item.title: Azure Maps Adds Support to Private Endpoints (Preview)
item.description: Location data is by nature sensitive and therefore needs to be managed securely. Today, we’re announcing the Public Preview of private endpoint support for Azure Maps, bringing enterprise-grade network isolation and data privacy to your location-aware applications. With Azure Private Link, your...
item.dc:creator: PeterBr

item.title: Problema con Windows Insider – Canale Canary
item.description: Buonasera,sto utilizzando Windows 11 Insider – Canale Canary (Versione 26H1 build 28020.1495) e nella schermata “Informazioni su Windows” compare che la copia di prova scade l’11/08/2026.Vorrei capire:perché è presente questa scadenzacosa devo fare per evitare problemi o blocchi del sistemaInoltre...
item.dc:creator: azzaramario

item.title: Introducing Skills in Azure API Center
item.description: The problem Modern applications depend on more than APIs. A single AI workflow might call an LLM, invoke an MCP tool, integrate a third-party service, and reference a business capability spanning dozens of endpoints. Without a central inventory, these assets become impossible to discover, easy to...
item.dc:creator: anishta

item.title: Reenroll Company Owned With Work Profile Android
item.description: I have been putting together a profile that will allow our company to enroll our Android devices into Intune as a Company Owned with Work Profile.One question I currently have is, if we ever need to remove the Work Profile say for troubleshooting do we have to do a complete factory reset of the...
item.dc:creator: BrentH72

item.title: Azure SDK Release (March 2026)
item.description: Azure SDK releases every month. In this post, you find this month's highlights and release notes. The post Azure SDK Release (March 2026) appeared first on Azure SDK Blog.
item.dc:creator: Ronnie Geraghty

item.title: Gemini 3 Pro deprecated
item.description: We have deprecated Gemini 3 Pro across all GitHub Copilot experiences (including Copilot Chat, inline edits, ask and agent modes, and code completions) today, March 26, 2026. Model Deprecation date… The post Gemini 3 Pro deprecated appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Breaking Change Ahead: Graph API Updates to Sensitive Email Properties
item.description: On 12/31/2026, we will begin restricting updates to sensitive properties on non-draft email messages (including subject, body, and recipients). Apps will need Mail-Advanced.ReadWrite (or .All / .Shared) with admin consent to continue modifying these fields. Review your current usage and update...
item.dc:creator: Thomas Mechelke

item.title: Credential revocation API now supports GitHub OAuth and GitHub app credentials
item.description: We’ve extended the Credential revocation API to support additional token types, enabling you to programmatically revoke any exposed credentials found on repositories or elsewhere. This helps you quickly limit the… The post Credential revocation API now supports GitHub OAuth and GitHub app...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Microsoft Entra Tenant Governance: Secure and Manage Multi-Tenant Environments at Scale
item.description: Managing identity across multiple tenants is a growing challenge for organizations of all sizes. Mergers, acquisitions, and the rise of shadow IT often lead to a fragmented tenant landscape—creating security and compliance blind spots that attackers are quick to exploit. Even a single poorly...
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dadzie

item.title: Evolving Identity Security: How the Conditional Access Optimization Agent Helps You Adapt
item.description: Organizations are expanding Zero Trust across more users, applications, and now a growing population of AI agent identities, making it even more challenging to maintain visibility and control at scale. As environments grow more complex and change daily, static best-practice approaches can’t keep...
item.dc:creator: Swaroop Krishnamurthy

item.title: Ask @copilot to resolve merge conflicts on pull requests
item.description: Copilot coding agent can now resolve merge conflicts on pull requests. To ask Copilot to resolve merge conflicts, mention @copilot in a comment and tell it what to do: @copilot… The post Ask @copilot to resolve merge conflicts on pull requests appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Copy dashboards from Dashboards with Grafana to Azure Managed Grafana
item.description: Azure Monitor Dashboards with Grafana provides an in‑portal Grafana experience optimized for Azure Monitor and managed Prometheus data. For many teams, that simplicity is exactly what they need. As observability practices mature, teams often need more than visualization: broader data source...
item.dc:creator: aayodeji

item.title: New pull requests dashboard is in public preview
item.description: A public preview of the refreshed pull requests dashboard is now available at github.com/pulls, introducing a new pull request inbox and saved views so you can organize and prioritize the… The post New pull requests dashboard is in public preview appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: View Agentic Workflow configs in the Actions run summary
item.description: You can now view your Agentic Workflow markdown configs directly in the GitHub Actions run summary for any agentic workflow. This update makes it easier to review runs by: Reducing… The post View Agentic Workflow configs in the Actions run summary appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: TypeScript AppHost in Aspire 13.2: same app model, different syntax
item.description: Aspire 13.2 enables TypeScript developers to define AppHosts directly in TypeScript, with the same streamlined Aspire application model. The post TypeScript AppHost in Aspire 13.2: same app model, different syntax appeared first on Aspire Blog.
item.dc:creator: Sebastien Ros

item.title: Agent activity in GitHub Issues and Projects
item.description: Today, we’re shipping two new features that bring agent activity directly into your planning workflows. Agent sessions under assignees in GitHub Issues When a coding agent (e.g., Copilot, Claude, or… The post Agent activity in GitHub Issues and Projects appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: What’s coming to our GitHub Actions 2026 security roadmap
item.description: A look at GitHub Actions’ 2026 roadmap, outlining how secure defaults, policy controls, and CI/CD observability harden the software supply chain end to end. The post What’s coming to our GitHub Actions 2026 security roadmap appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Greg Ose

item.title: A year of open source vulnerability trends: CVEs, advisories, and malware
item.description: Reviewed advisories hit a four-year low, malware advisories surged, and CNA publishing grew—here’s what changed and what it means for your triage and response. The post A year of open source vulnerability trends: CVEs, advisories, and malware appeared first on The GitHub Blog.
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Evans

item.title: Assess Azure DDoS Protection Status Across Your Environment
item.description: Introduction Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) attacks continue to be one of the most prevalent threats facing organizations with internet-facing workloads. Azure DDoS Protection provides cloud-scale protection against L3/4 volumetric attacks, helping ensure your applications remain available...
item.dc:creator: SaleemBseeu

item.title: Custom images for GitHub-hosted runners are now generally available
item.description: Custom images for GitHub-hosted runners are now generally available. Originally introduced in public preview in October 2025, this feature lets you start with a GitHub-curated base image and build your… The post Custom images for GitHub-hosted runners are now generally available appeared first on...
item.dc:creator: Allison

item.title: Teams webinar poll participant numbers
item.description: I'm trying to work out whether a Teams webinar using a premium account will allow more than 300 people to take part in a poll. At a recent webinar with over 500 attendees the polls crashed because too many people were trying to vote. According to some info I'm finding online, a webinar set up with...
item.dc:creator: Ros12369
